hooks.command: node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{let f;try{const j=JSON.parse(d);f=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||(j.tool_response&&j.tool_response.filePath);if(f&&/\.js$/.test(f)){const r=require("child_process").spawnSync("node",["--check",f],{stdio:"inherit"});if(r.status){console.error("[hook] JS syntax check failed: "+f);process.exitCode=2;}}}catch(e){}})'

node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{let f;try{const j=JSON.parse(d);f=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||(j.tool_response&&j.tool_response.filePath);if(f&&/manifest\.json$/.test(f)){const fs=require("fs");let manifest;try{manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,"utf8"));}catch(e){console.error("[hook] manifest.json is not valid JSON: "+e.message);process.exitCode=2;return;}const required=["manifest_version","name","version"];const missing=required.filter(k=>!(k in manifest));if(missing.length){console.error("[hook] manifest.json is missing required field(s): "+missing.join(", "));process.exitCode=2;}}}catch(e){}})'
